hooks.name: statusline
hooks.description: Real-time HUD rendered via Claude Code's statusline API. Invoked every ~300ms by Claude Code. Receives session JSON on stdin, renders multi-line display to stdout.
hooks.description_zh: 通过 Claude Code 的 statusline API 渲染的实时 HUD。Claude Code 约每 300ms 调用一次。从 stdin 接收会话 JSON，向 stdout 输出多行显示。

invocation.stdin: Session JSON containing model info, token counts, rate limits, and transcript path
invocation.stdout: Rendered display lines (multi-line for expanded layout, single-line for compact)

dataSources.name: stdin-json
dataSources.description: Session data from Claude Code: model name, context_window.current_usage, context_window.context_window_size, rate_limits.five_hour, rate_limits.seven_day, transcript_path

dataSources.name: transcript-jsonl
dataSources.description: Parsed from transcript_path: tool_use blocks (name, input, start_time), tool_result blocks (completion, duration), TodoWrite calls, Task calls for agent info

dataSources.name: config-files
dataSources.description: MCP count from ~/.claude/settings.json (mcpServers), rules count from CLAUDE.md files, hooks count

dataSources.name: git-status
dataSources.description: Branch name, dirty indicator, ahead/behind counts, file stats via git CLI

displayElements.name: model-badge
displayElements.description: Model name + provider label in brackets, e.g. [Opus]

displayElements.name: context-bar
displayElements.description: Visual health bar: green (<70%), yellow (70-85%), red (>85%), shows percentage or token count

displayElements.name: git-status
displayElements.description: Branch, dirty indicator (*), ahead/behind, file stats. Sub-options: showDirty, showAheadBehind, showFileStats

displayElements.name: usage-limits
displayElements.description: 5-hour and 7-day rate-limit consumption with reset countdowns

displayElements.name: tool-activity
displayElements.description: Real-time file reads, edits, searches from transcript JSONL

displayElements.name: agent-tracking
displayElements.description: Subagent name, model, task description, duration

displayElements.name: todo-progress
displayElements.description: Task completion counts from TodoWrite calls

displayElements.name: session-cost
displayElements.description: Session cost (native field or local estimate fallback)

displayElements.name: memory-usage
displayElements.description: Approximate system RAM (opt-in, expanded layout only)

displayElements.name: prompt-cache
displayElements.description: Countdown timer based on last assistant response timestamp

displayElements.name: config-counts
displayElements.description: Count of CLAUDE.md files, rules, MCPs, hooks

expanded.description: Multi-line default. Line 1: model badge + project + git. Line 2: context bar + usage bar. Optional additional lines for tools, agents, todos, config counts.

compact.description: Single line with all elements merged. Optional separators between element groups.
